title: Insolvency practitioner bulletin 2 (2024): record tax and National Insurance payments for former employees
body: "This bulletin explains:   when you need to record tax and National Insurance due on a dividend paid to former employees of an insolvent entity when you need to set up an Employment Protection Act (EPA) PAYE Scheme how to set up the scheme what you need to submit if making additional payments after a final Full Payment Submission (FPS) has been submitted   "
